use q.as_extended
  constructor
  · -- Show that as_extended q = ok (as_extended q)
    simp
  · -- Show the modular arithmetic conditions
    let X := Field51_as_Nat q.X
    let Y := Field51_as_Nat q.Y
    let Z := Field51_as_Nat q.Z
    let T := Field51_as_Nat q.T
    let X' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).X
    let Y' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).Y
    let Z' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).Z
    let T' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).T
    have h1 : (q.as_extended).X = q.X * q.T := by
      simp [as_extended]
    have h2 : (q.as_extended).Y = q.Y * q.Z := by
      simp [as_extended]
    have h3 : (q.as_extended).Z = q.Z * q.T := by
      simp [as_extended]
    have h4 : (q.as_extended).T = q.X * q.Y := by
      simp [as_extended]
    constructor
    · -- Show X' % p = (X * T) % p
      simp [h1]
    constructor
    · -- Show Y' % p = (Y * Z) % p
      simp [h2]
    constructor
    · -- Show Z' % p = (Z * T) % p
      simp [h3]
    · -- Show T' % p = (X * Y) % p
      simp [h4]

  · -- Show that as_extended q = ok e

    let X' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).X

    let Z' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).Z

    have h2 : (q.as_extended).Y = q.Y * q.Z := by

    have h3 : (q.as_extended).Z = q.Z * q.T := by

    all_goals

use (EdwardsPoint.mk (q.X * q.T) (q.Y * q.Z) (q.Z * q.T) (q.X * q.Y))
  constructor
  · -- Show that q.as_extended = ok e
    rw [as_extended]
    all_goals simp [q]
  · -- Show the modular congruences
    let X := Field51_as_Nat q.X
    let Y := Field51_as_Nat q.Y
    let Z := Field51_as_Nat q.Z
    let T := Field51_as_Nat q.T
    let X' := Field51_as_Nat (q.X * q.T)
    let Y' := Field51_as_Nat (q.Y * q.Z)
    let Z' := Field51_as_Nat (q.Z * q.T)
    let T' := Field51_as_Nat (q.X * q.Y)
    have h1 : X' % p = (X * T) % p := by
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_self]
    have h2 : Y' % p = (Y * Z) % p := by
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_self]
    have h3 : Z' % p = (Z * T) % p := by
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_self]
    have h4 : T' % p = (X * Y) % p := by
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_self]
    exact ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩

use q.as_extended
  constructor
  · -- Show that q.as_extended is successful
    rfl
  · -- Show that the coordinates satisfy the conversion formulas
    let X := Field51_as_Nat q.X
    let Y := Field51_as_Nat q.Y
    let Z := Field51_as_Nat q.Z
    let T := Field51_as_Nat q.T
    let e := q.as_extended
    let X' := Field51_as_Nat e.X
    let Y' := Field51_as_Nat e.Y
    let Z' := Field51_as_Nat e.Z
    let T' := Field51_as_Nat e.T
    have h1 : X' % p = (X * T) % p := by
      native_decide
    have h2 : Y' % p = (Y * Z) % p := by
      native_decide
    have h3 : Z' % p = (Z * T) % p := by
      native_decide
    have h4 : T' % p = (X * Y) % p := by
      native_decide
    exact ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩

use q.as_extended
  constructor
  · -- Show that q.as_extended is ok
    rfl
  · -- Show the coordinates satisfy the conversion formulas
    let X := Field51_as_Nat q.X
    let Y := Field51_as_Nat q.Y
    let Z := Field51_as_Nat q.Z
    let T := Field51_as_Nat q.T
    let X' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).X
    let Y' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).Y
    let Z' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).Z
    let T' := Field51_as_Nat (q.as_extended).T
    have h1 : X' % p = (X * T) % p := by 
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      <;> try { native_decide }
    have h2 : Y' % p = (Y * Z) % p := by 
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      <;> try { native_decide }
    have h3 : Z' % p = (Z * T) % p := by 
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      <;> try { native_decide }
    have h4 : T' % p = (X * Y) % p := by 
      simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      <;> try { native_decide }
    exact ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩
